title: Add Skillful Actor negative benchmarks
description: Add benchmark coverage for the failure modes that would make v5.0 fake: missing skill evidence, weak actor assignment, stale release state, policy-bypassed allocation, missing resource claim, and output contract mismatch.
triage_notes: Subtask of TASK-048 step 5/6: add negative benchmark cases for missing skill evidence, weak assignment, stale release state, policy bypass, missing resource claim, and output mismatch.
